---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for the Inkog CLI
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The Problem

What problem are you running into? What does your current workflow look like?

## Proposed Solution

How would you like this to work? A CLI flag? A new output format? A different policy preset?

If relevant, sketch what the command and output might look like:

```bash
$ inkog --your-new-flag .
```

## Alternatives Considered

What workarounds have you tried? Why don't they fit?

## Why It Matters

Who benefits? CI users, framework authors, security teams, all of the above? Rough estimate of impact helps prioritization.

## Additional Context

- Links to similar features in other tools
- Related issues / prior discussion
- Anything else that helps us understand the ask
